name: Clean up stale Entra B2B guest accounts with Microsoft Graph, Teams and SharePoint

parameters.content:
## Entra ID Governance: Cleanup Stale B2B Guest Accounts via Sign-In Activity

### How it works

This workflow runs weekly to review Microsoft Entra ID B2B guest accounts, page through guest user data from Microsoft Graph, and identify accounts with stale sign-in activity. For each stale guest, it attempts to find the sponsor or manager, notifies them in Teams, waits 72 hours, then deletes the guest account if no intervention occurs. It logs successful deletions to SharePoint, alerts Teams on delete failures, and posts summary messages when there are no stale guests or when processing completes.

### Setup steps

- Configure Microsoft Graph credentials with permissions to read users and sign-in activity, read manager or sponsor information, and delete guest user accounts.
- Set the SharePoint site and list IDs in the Config node so deletion audit records are written to the correct list.
- Set the Teams team and channel IDs in the Config node for sponsor notifications, error alerts, and completion summaries.
- Confirm the stale-account threshold and Graph query fields in the filtering and fetch nodes match your governance policy.
- Validate that the weekly schedule and 72-hour wait period meet your organization’s review and remediation requirements.

### Customization

Adjust the stale sign-in threshold, notification wording, wait duration, SharePoint audit fields, and Teams destinations to match internal guest lifecycle policies.

## Schedule and configure

Starts the workflow on a weekly schedule, loads tenant-specific SharePoint and Teams IDs, and initializes the pagination state for retrieving guest accounts.

## Fetch guest pages

Retrieves guest users from Microsoft Graph page by page, accumulates the returned guests, and loops with the next page URL while more results exist.

## Filter stale results

Applies the stale guest criteria to the accumulated guest list, checks whether any stale accounts were found, and sends a Teams end message when none are present.

## Create processing loop

Expands the stale guest array into individual guest items and starts a batch loop so each stale account can be handled one at a time.

## Lookup guest sponsor

For each stale guest, queries Microsoft Graph for sponsor or manager details and stages the guest and sponsor fields used by downstream notifications and deletion steps.

## Notify and wait

Sends a Teams notification to the responsible sponsor or manager, then pauses the workflow for 72 hours before continuing with remediation.

## Delete guest account

Attempts to delete the stale guest account through Microsoft Graph and branches based on whether the delete operation succeeded.

## Alert delete failure

Sends a Teams alert when deletion fails so administrators can investigate the affected stale guest account manually.

## Log successful deletion

Writes successful guest deletions to the configured SharePoint list as an audit record.

## Continue guest loop

Merges the success and failure branches and routes control back to the batch loop to process the next stale guest.

## Post completion summary

Handles the end of the stale guest batch loop and posts a Teams summary after all stale guests have been processed.

parameters.message: =✅ Guest Account Governance: Weekly scan complete. No stale B2B guest accounts found (threshold: {{ $('Set Config Parameters').item.json.inactivityThresholdDays }} days). Total guests scanned: {{ $json.totalScanned }}

parameters.url: =https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/sites/{{ $('Prepare Guest and Sponsor Data').item.json.sharepointSiteId }}/lists/{{ $('Prepare Guest and Sponsor Data').item.json.sharepointListId }}/items
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { GuestEmail: $('Prepare Guest and Sponsor Data').item.json.guestEmail, DisplayName: $('Prepare Guest and Sponsor Data').item.json.displayName, LastSignIn: $('Prepare Guest and Sponsor Data').item.json.lastSignIn, SponsorNotified: $('Prepare Guest and Sponsor Data').item.json.sponsorEmail, DeletedAt: $now.toISO(), DeletedBy: 'n8n-governance-workflow' } }) }}

parameters.message:
=✅ **Guest Account Governance: Run Complete**

All stale B2B guest accounts have been processed.

_Check the SharePoint GuestAccountAuditLog list for full deletion records._

**Completed:** {{ $now.toISO() }}
